setopt SH_WORD_SPLIT KSH_ARRAYS

local escaped

')

Bash(zsh -c '
setopt SH_WORD_SPLIT KSH_ARRAYS
set -euo pipefail
items=\("a" "b"\)
for v in "${items[@]}"; do
  local escaped
  escaped=$\(printf "%s" "$v" | sed "s/x/y/g"\)
  echo "result: $escaped"
done
')
